offences: Electricity theft, ID offences, administrative violations
details: Targeted operations conducted in Argos and Nafplio. Police focused on checking electricity connections and verifying identity documents of residents.

offences: Electricity theft, lack of IDs, environmental/health violations
details: Preventive checks carried out in settlements in Argolida and Corinthia. Officers inspected illegal electricity connections and checked for environmental violations.

offences: Electricity theft, administrative offences, ID checks
details: Follow-up operations in the same areas as previous raids. Focus remained on administrative violations and illegal electricity usage.

offences: Preventive policing, vehicle inspections, electricity theft
details: Coordinated operation across three regions involving vehicle inspections and checks for illegal electricity connections.

offences: Electricity theft, ID related violations
details: Operations focused on ID violations and electricity theft. Police reports used euphemistic language regarding the nature of the settlements.

offences: Electricity theft, lack of IDs, administrative violations
details: Large regional operation spanning three prefectures. Police conducted mass checks for IDs and administrative compliance.

offences: Electricity theft, administrative violations

offences: Electricity theft, administrative offences, preventive checks
details: Early rollout of the campaign in Arcadia, Corinthia, and Messinia. Preventive checks were the primary focus.

offences: Electricity theft
details: Five arrests made. Police reports cited 'social homogeneity' as a justification for the operation.

offences: Electricity theft, narcotics, lack of IDs, illegal street trading, neglect of minor supervision

offences: Electricity theft, water theft, lack of IDs
details: Operations focused on water and electricity theft alongside mass ID checks in Corinthia and Laconia.

details: Routine preventive controls conducted in Argolida and Corinthia.

details: Operations targeting environmental offences and illegal electricity connections.

offences: Electricity theft, administrative offences
details: Seizure of illegal cables used for electricity theft. Administrative offences cited.

offences: Electricity theft, water theft, administrative violations
details: Large-scale regional operation spanning four prefectures. Focus on water and electricity theft.

offences: Electricity theft, lack of IDs, health violations, administrative offences
details: Nineteen arrests made. Health violations and lack of IDs were primary charges.

offences: Suspected organised crime offences
details: Armed units and drones deployed in Gastouni. Suspected organised crime offences cited.

offences: Electricity theft
details: OPKE units with K-9 dogs conducted operations resulting in 16 arrests.

details: Continuation of the established pattern of raids in Argolida and Corinthia.

details: Massive operation with 230 people checked and 46 homes searched.

details: Multiple settlements targeted in Kalamata and Messini.

details: Ten arrests made. Weapons were cited as a reason for the operation.

details: Major operation in Zefyri involving UAVs (drones). 10 arrests made.

desc: Targeted operation in Velou-Voha and Sikyonion municipalities
offences: Electricity theft, lack of IDs, traffic violations
details: Targeted operation conducted in settlements in Velou-Voha and Sikyonion. Police checked 22 individuals, brought in 8, and arrested 8 for electricity theft (4), lack of ID cards (3), and traffic violations (1). 9 traffic violations were also recorded.

desc: Targeted operation in Argos-Mycenae and Nafplio municipalities
offences: Lack of IDs, health regulation violations, electricity theft, neglect of minor supervision
details: Targeted operation conducted in settlements in Argos-Mycenae and Nafplio. Police checked 21 individuals, brought in 7, and arrested 6 for lack of ID cards (2), health regulation violations (2), electricity theft (1), and neglect of minor supervision (1). Illegal electrical cables were seized.

desc: Targeted operation in Pyrgos municipality with DEH cooperation
offences: Health regulation violations (illegal settlement), electricity theft
details: Targeted operation in Pyrgos municipality involving DEH (electricity utility) personnel. Police checked 154 individuals and 90 vehicles, conducted 12 home searches, brought in 11, and arrested 9 for health regulation violations regarding illegal settlements (6) and electricity theft (3). 36 traffic violations were also recorded.
